description: Update all third-party package dependencies in the docs/ site to their latest versions.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Update docs dependencies to latest versions
userStories.description: As a docs contributor, I want all docs dependencies updated to their latest compatible versions so that the docs site uses the most recent bug fixes and improvements.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/package.json dependencies updated: @headlessui/react ^2.1.9→^2.2.9, lucide-react ^0.575.0→latest (already on 0.575.0 — verify), rehype-pretty-code ^0.14.0→^0.14.1, sonner ^2.0.3→^2.0.7, unist-util-visit ^5.0.0→^5.1.0

docs/package.json devDependencies updated: @tailwindcss/postcss ^4.0.14→^4.2.1, tailwindcss ^4.0.14→^4.2.1, knip ^5.84.1→^5.85.0, postcss ^8→^8.5.6, @eslint/eslintrc ^3.3.3→^3.3.4, @typescript-eslint/parser ^8.56.0→^8.56.1, typescript-eslint ^8.56.0→^8.56.1
ESLint major version (9→10) is NOT bumped
typescript specifier left as ^5 (already covers latest 5.9.3)
npm install completes without errors (run from docs/)
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes: Edit docs/package.json. The docs site is a standalone Next.js project with its own node_modules. After editing, run `cd docs && npm install` to update the lockfile. Then run `cd docs && npm run check` (which runs build + type-check + lint + knip + format:check). Key things to watch: (1) @headlessui/react 2.1→2.2 is a minor bump but Headless UI sometimes changes component APIs — search docs/src/ for Headless UI component usage and verify compatibility; (2) tailwindcss/postcss 4.0→4.2 is a minor bump that should be safe; (3) postcss ^8→^8.5.6 just tightens the range. Do NOT bump eslint to v10 or @eslint/js to v10 — the ecosystem plugins don't support it yet.
